features: Initial release of SKVA with core key-value storage engine
Support for string, integer, and binary data types
Persistent storage option using WAL (Write-Ahead Logging)
Add support for TTL (Time-to-Live) on keys
Enhance authentication with role-based access control (RBAC)
Introduce monitoring endpoints and metrics export (Prometheus format)
Distributed clustering support with leader election
Add secondary indexing for faster queries
Support for JSON as a native data type
